mnemonics.title: NFA vs DFA
mnemonics.content: NFA has multiple next states, DFA has unique next state

acronyms.usage: Used to recognize patterns in strings
Used to recognize patterns in strings with unique next state

visualTips.visualization: Imagine a machine with multiple possible next states
Imagine a transition without consuming any input symbol

analogies.analogy: A person trying to find a path in a maze with multiple possible paths
A person following a map with a unique path to the destination
